item.description: My respect to you, sir. One love.
item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: I bet the pipes felt nice after that
item.dc:creator: camn333

item.title: Secret Weapon
item.description: magine an alternate universe where we couldn’t make comics and be forced to get a real job! Trains would be crashing, pots would be exploding, and our patient would be flatlining on the operating table while we tested out our latest jokes on the OR staff. By joining our Patreon you enable us to do what we do best: making you laugh week for week, come rain or shine, with our comics. Your support means we don’t have to get a real job, which saves hundreds –nay – thousands of lives each week. Amazing! https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 901
item.description:
1
2

8
9

12

14
15
16

18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alden Ehrenreich
When I was young, I admired clever people. Now that I am old, I admire kind people. -Abraham Joshua Heschel So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: THIS IS WHY THEY ARE HIDING MCCONNELL’S BODY!
item.dc:creator: danwhitfield

item.title: A little more celebration.
item.description: Well, it wasn't long before one of these comments popped off. So, made a little video with the wife while we were having morning coffee. Don't forget how many times the President of the United States, Donald Trump, had said horrible things when people passed away. I don't feel the slightest bit bad. "Lindsey Graham was among the most viciously racist & bloodthirsty warmongers in the history of Congress. That he was also pretty clearly a closeted gay man who chose to make the lives of all marginalized people miserable in service to power says everything about him. Rest in piss" A Great Start to the Day https://imgur.com/gallery/xE93ACl If anybody would like to help us buy some coffee, that would be amazing. https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/RoderickSquareshttps://linktr.ee/GridSquares
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1745 (annular throbber)
item.description:
Lets get this bread.
Spoon-billed sandpipers are severely endangered
Yeah this tracks
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pip! Step up. Pippin. Pippin!" ___1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone, we're all excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been a big help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
Puckett is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have Angels on this post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 5th, 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 8th. 9th, 10th and 11th by @OP 12th by Pizza Angel @jaenen 13th, 14th and 15th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Fresh to death memes
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
I thought that's what all of the comedies were about
Would watch
It's a waste of time in English too
What if they don't have it the next time you go?
Factory fresh
I would have to lose over a hundred pounds to be beach ready. No thanks.
Spock is hard to read though
Horror story
Layout 2
How did he not pop it?
Good for her
Throw him under the bus!
Grandma needs to embrace just saying she isn't in the right frame of mind to chat
I doubt everyone would know Halloumi but Gorgonzola is definitely known as a cheese
Guess you don't know your mom very well
So it's free?
That's my mom
Tell her that yours is an investment and you have a job, but she doesn't
Perfect idea
OMG
Please be this nice to pregnant ladies
Why though?
Somebody recognized him!
Sound idea
Wild
Professors in movies are nuts
They spent a long time getting that title! It's today's Duke
I hadn't even thought of that
I miss preCovid life
This story was wild
So glad I haven't ever met that guy. He seems like a douche
Wow. He's a naturalist
He's ahead of his time
Agreed. Kids have a need, neighbor is a jerk on purpose
Time for quiet alone time in separated rooms
John is me
We need to remember kindness and mercy for everyone
This is everyone with kitties
Umm, how did it get in?
I love babies like that
I mean, she's totally right.
I think Dad is great, personally
Wow she's seen some things
My great uncle, slightly mentally impaired due to loss of oxygen saturation at birth, was sleeping in the field when my grandfather ran over him with a tractor, but it had rained so he sank into the mud. He was perfectly fine and went on to marry and have two children.
How do you get that last name?
Apparently the original didn't have a happy member
Take the day off
I love the last one
God made you special and he loves you very much
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Wild Horses Pass Astonished Kayakers and Paddleboarders at Salt River, Arizona
item.dc:creator: Ralimione

item.title: Happy Etch A Sketch Day!
item.description: Today Etch A Sketch turns 66 years old! Wooh! Under normal circumstances I would be celebrating this fun occasion with a wee bit more pomp and circumstance, but alas! I recently returned from a whirlwind Michigan/Chicago trip where I taught 7 Etch A Sketch workshops, and I brought home a lovely virus which has had me practically couchbound ever since. (No it's not that diarrhea one so at least I have that going for me.) The above photo was snapped after my most recent library workshop in Maryland, which feels like as apropos a celebratory photo as any since I had the pleasure of meeting a handful of you on my more recent workshop adventures. As I continue convalescing, I'd love to learn about your favorite toy when you were a kid. You already know what mine is! Wishing you all the Etchiest of Sketches on this auspicious occasion :)
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Good times
